title: How to pick a monitoring service

steps.label: Open Resources
steps.narrationPlain: This page has guides, monitoring links, and videos.

steps.label: Monitoring section
steps.narrationPlain: Scroll to Credit monitoring tools. You will see four options.

steps.label: HTML-friendly
steps.narrationPlain: MyScoreIQ, IdentityIQ, and SmartCredit work best for HTML upload in the portal.
